title: Form view to have an option for paragraph text
excerpt: I have noticed in form view, a question (column) description field seems to be restricted to 10 lines of text. I’d like an option for a paragraph of text to be inserted, to provide additional details and information that…

posts.author: HelenCC (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml: I have noticed in form view, a question (column) description field seems to be restricted to 10 lines of text. I’d like an option for a paragraph of text to be inserted, to provide additional details and information that do not specifically relate to a ‘question’ (column).

posts.author: Axel1 (Barbé--Husson)
posts.cookedHtml: you need to choose a longtext in option of column

posts.author: HelenCC (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for the suggestion, not sure how this helps with question description though? Its not the input that’s the issue. It’s describing the question

posts.author: BelindaB (Belinda Billinge)
posts.cookedHtml: I need this too. I have just moved to monday but will need to leave the majority of my forms in JotForm for now as I have forms that need the option to put paragraphs in for consents, descriptions etc. (medical forms)
